task_frame_summary: The baseline path appears actionable, but the surrounding language may be compressing disagreement into artificial consensus.
assumed_goal: Check whether the current frame closes too early around a superficially stable interpretation.
explicit_constraints: Respect the existing contradiction-to-review baseline artifacts.
Do not add truth or runtime authority.
latent_frame_risks: The frame may underweight unresolved disagreement because the baseline already feels coherent.
Thin evidence may be carrying too much certainty about the next move.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Which disagreement remains real even if the baseline summary reads cleanly?
What missing signal would materially change the confidence of the current frame?
frame_risk_signals: fast convergence around an incomplete evidence story
unresolved contradiction is described as mostly settled
notes: The core risk is false consensus, not malformed syntax or missing structure.
